1.text: The word<S>1697</S> of the LORD<S>3068</S> which came unto Zephaniah<S>6846</S> the son<S>1121</S> of Cushi<S>3570</S>, the son<S>1121</S> of Gedaliah<S>1436</S>, the son<S>1121</S> of Amariah<S>568</S>, the son<S>1121</S> of Hizkiah<S>2396</S>, in the days<S>3117</S> of Josiah<S>2977</S> the son<S>1121</S> of Amon<S>526</S>, king<S>4428</S> of Judah<S>3063</S>.

I will utterly<S>622</S> consume<S>5486</S> all things from off the land<S>6440</S> <S>127</S>, saith<S>5002</S> the LORD<S>3068</S>. <sup>I will: Heb. By taking away I will make an end</sup> <sup>the land: Heb. the face of the land</sup>

I will consume<S>5486</S> man<S>120</S> and beast<S>929</S>; I will consume<S>5486</S> the fowls<S>5775</S> of the heaven<S>8064</S>, and the fishes<S>1709</S> of the sea<S>3220</S>, and the stumblingblocks<S>4384</S> with the wicked<S>7563</S>; and I will cut off<S>3772</S> man<S>120</S> from off<S>6440</S> the land<S>127</S>, saith<S>5002</S> the LORD<S>3068</S>. <sup>stumblingblocks: or, idols</sup>

I will also stretch out<S>5186</S> mine hand<S>3027</S> upon Judah<S>3063</S>, and upon all the inhabitants<S>3427</S> of Jerusalem<S>3389</S>; and I will cut off<S>3772</S> the remnant<S>7605</S> of Baal<S>1168</S> from this place<S>4725</S>, and the name<S>8034</S> of the Chemarims<S>3649</S> with the priests<S>3548</S>;

And them that worship<S>7812</S> the host<S>6635</S> of heaven<S>8064</S> upon the housetops<S>1406</S>; and them that worship<S>7812</S> and that swear<S>7650</S> by the LORD<S>3068</S>, and that swear<S>7650</S> by Malcham<S>4428</S>; <sup>by the: or, to the LORD</sup>
And them that are turned back<S>5472</S> from<S>310</S> the LORD<S>3068</S>; and those that have not sought<S>1245</S> the LORD<S>3068</S>, nor enquired<S>1875</S> for him.

Hold thy peace<S>2013</S> at the presence<S>6440</S> of the Lord<S>136</S> GOD<S>3069</S>: for the day<S>3117</S> of the LORD<S>3068</S> is at hand<S>7138</S>: for the LORD<S>3068</S> hath prepared<S>3559</S> a sacrifice<S>2077</S>, he hath bid<S>6942</S> his guests<S>7121</S>. <sup>bid: Heb. sanctified, or, prepared</sup>

And it shall come to pass in the day<S>3117</S> of the LORD'S<S>3068</S> sacrifice<S>2077</S>, that I will punish<S>6485</S> the princes<S>8269</S>, and the king's<S>4428</S> children<S>1121</S>, and all such as are clothed<S>3847</S> with strange<S>5237</S> apparel<S>4403</S>. <sup>punish: Heb. visit upon</sup>

In the same day<S>3117</S> also will I punish<S>6485</S> all those that leap<S>1801</S> on the threshold<S>4670</S>, which fill<S>4390</S> their masters'<S>113</S> houses<S>1004</S> with violence<S>2555</S> and deceit<S>4820</S>.

And it shall come to pass in that day<S>3117</S>, saith<S>5002</S> the LORD<S>3068</S>, that there shall be the noise<S>6963</S> of a cry<S>6818</S> from the fish<S>1709</S> gate<S>8179</S>, and an howling<S>3215</S> from the second<S>4932</S>, and a great<S>1419</S> crashing<S>7667</S> from the hills<S>1389</S>.

Howl<S>3213</S>, ye inhabitants<S>3427</S> of Maktesh<S>4389</S>, for all the merchant<S>3667</S> people<S>5971</S> are cut down<S>1820</S>; all they that bear<S>5187</S> silver<S>3701</S> are cut off<S>3772</S>.

And it shall come to pass at that time<S>6256</S>, that I will search<S>2664</S> Jerusalem<S>3389</S> with candles<S>5216</S>, and punish<S>6485</S> the men<S>582</S> that are settled<S>7087</S> on their lees<S>8105</S>: that say<S>559</S> in their heart<S>3824</S>, The LORD<S>3068</S> will not do good<S>3190</S>, neither will he do evil<S>7489</S>. <sup>settled: Heb. curded, or, thickened</sup>

Therefore their goods<S>2428</S> shall become a booty<S>4933</S>, and their houses<S>1004</S> a desolation<S>8077</S>: they shall also build<S>1129</S> houses<S>1004</S>, but not inhabit<S>3427</S> them; and they shall plant<S>5193</S> vineyards<S>3754</S>, but not drink<S>8354</S> the wine<S>3196</S> thereof.

The great<S>1419</S> day<S>3117</S> of the LORD<S>3068</S> is near<S>7138</S>, it is near<S>7138</S>, and hasteth<S>4118</S> greatly<S>3966</S>, even the voice<S>6963</S> of the day<S>3117</S> of the LORD<S>3068</S>: the mighty man<S>1368</S> shall cry<S>6873</S> there bitterly<S>4751</S>.

That day<S>3117</S> is a day<S>3117</S> of wrath<S>5678</S>, a day<S>3117</S> of trouble<S>6869</S> and distress<S>4691</S>, a day<S>3117</S> of wasteness<S>7722</S> and desolation<S>4875</S>, a day<S>3117</S> of darkness<S>2822</S> and gloominess<S>653</S>, a day<S>3117</S> of clouds<S>6051</S> and thick darkness<S>6205</S>,
A day<S>3117</S> of the trumpet<S>7782</S> and alarm<S>8643</S> against the fenced<S>1219</S> cities<S>5892</S>, and against the high<S>1364</S> towers<S>6438</S>.

And I will bring distress<S>6887</S> upon men<S>120</S>, that they shall walk<S>1980</S> like blind men<S>5787</S>, because they have sinned<S>2398</S> against the LORD<S>3068</S>: and their blood<S>1818</S> shall be poured out<S>8210</S> as dust<S>6083</S>, and their flesh<S>3894</S> as the dung<S>1561</S>.

Neither their silver<S>3701</S> nor their gold<S>2091</S> shall be able<S>3201</S> to deliver<S>5337</S> them in the day<S>3117</S> of the LORD'S<S>3068</S> wrath<S>5678</S>; but the whole land<S>776</S> shall be devoured<S>398</S> by the fire<S>784</S> of his jealousy<S>7068</S>: for he shall make<S>6213</S> even a speedy<S>926</S> riddance<S>3617</S> of all them that dwell<S>3427</S> in the land<S>776</S>.

2.text: Gather yourselves together<S>7197</S>, yea, gather together<S>7197</S>, O nation<S>1471</S> not desired<S>3700</S>; <sup>not: or, not desirous</sup>

Before the decree<S>2706</S> bring forth<S>3205</S>, before the day<S>3117</S> pass<S>5674</S> as the chaff<S>4671</S>, before<S>3808</S> the fierce<S>2740</S> anger<S>639</S> of the LORD<S>3068</S> come<S>935</S> upon you, before the day<S>3117</S> of the LORD'S<S>3068</S> anger<S>639</S> come<S>935</S> upon you.

Seek<S>1245</S> ye the LORD<S>3068</S>, all ye meek<S>6035</S> of the earth<S>776</S>, which have wrought<S>6466</S> his judgment<S>4941</S>; seek<S>1245</S> righteousness<S>6664</S>, seek<S>1245</S> meekness<S>6038</S>: it may be<S>194</S> ye shall be hid<S>5641</S> in the day<S>3117</S> of the LORD'S<S>3068</S> anger<S>639</S>.

For Gaza<S>5804</S> shall be forsaken<S>5800</S>, and Ashkelon<S>831</S> a desolation<S>8077</S>: they shall drive out<S>1644</S> Ashdod<S>795</S> at the noon day<S>6672</S>, and Ekron<S>6138</S> shall be rooted up<S>6131</S>.

Woe<S>1945</S> unto the inhabitants<S>3427</S> of the sea<S>3220</S> coast<S>2256</S>, the nation<S>1471</S> of the Cherethites<S>3774</S>! the word<S>1697</S> of the LORD<S>3068</S> is against you; O Canaan<S>3667</S>, the land<S>776</S> of the Philistines<S>6430</S>, I will even destroy<S>6</S> thee, that there shall be no inhabitant<S>3427</S>.
And the sea<S>3220</S> coast<S>2256</S> shall be dwellings<S>5116</S> and cottages<S>3741</S> for shepherds<S>7462</S>, and folds<S>1448</S> for flocks<S>6629</S>.

And the coast<S>2256</S> shall be for the remnant<S>7611</S> of the house<S>1004</S> of Judah<S>3063</S>; they shall feed<S>7462</S> thereupon: in the houses<S>1004</S> of Ashkelon<S>831</S> shall they lie down<S>7257</S> in the evening<S>6153</S>: for the LORD<S>3068</S> their God<S>430</S> shall visit<S>6485</S> them, and turn away<S>7725</S> their captivity<S>7622</S> <S>7622</S>. <sup>for the LORD: or, when, etc</sup>

I have heard<S>8085</S> the reproach<S>2781</S> of Moab<S>4124</S>, and the revilings<S>1421</S> of the children<S>1121</S> of Ammon<S>5983</S>, whereby they have reproached<S>2778</S> my people<S>5971</S>, and magnified<S>1431</S> themselves against their border<S>1366</S>.

Therefore as I live<S>2416</S>, saith<S>5002</S> the LORD<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>, the God<S>430</S> of Israel<S>3478</S>, Surely Moab<S>4124</S> shall be as Sodom<S>5467</S>, and the children<S>1121</S> of Ammon<S>5983</S> as Gomorrah<S>6017</S>, even the breeding<S>4476</S> of nettles<S>2738</S>, and saltpits<S>4379</S> <S>4417</S>, and a perpetual<S>5704</S> <S>5769</S> desolation<S>8077</S>: the residue<S>7611</S> of my people<S>5971</S> shall spoil<S>962</S> them, and the remnant<S>3499</S> of my people<S>1471</S> shall possess<S>5157</S> them.
This shall they have for their pride<S>1347</S>, because they have reproached<S>2778</S> and magnified<S>1431</S> themselves against the people<S>5971</S> of the LORD<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>.

The LORD<S>3068</S> will be terrible<S>3372</S> unto them: for he will famish<S>7329</S> all the gods<S>430</S> of the earth<S>776</S>; and men shall worship<S>7812</S> him, every one<S>376</S> from his place<S>4725</S>, even all the isles<S>339</S> of the heathen<S>1471</S>. <sup>famish: Heb. make lean</sup>
Ye Ethiopians<S>3569</S> also, ye<S>1992</S> shall be slain<S>2491</S> by my sword<S>2719</S>.

And he will stretch out<S>5186</S> his hand<S>3027</S> against the north<S>6828</S>, and destroy<S>6</S> Assyria<S>804</S>; and will make<S>7760</S> Nineveh<S>5210</S> a desolation<S>8077</S>, and dry<S>6723</S> like a wilderness<S>4057</S>.

And flocks<S>5739</S> shall lie down<S>7257</S> in the midst<S>8432</S> of her, all the beasts<S>2416</S> of the nations<S>1471</S>: both the cormorant<S>6893</S> and the bittern<S>7090</S> shall lodge<S>3885</S> in the upper lintels<S>3730</S> of it; their voice<S>6963</S> shall sing<S>7891</S> in the windows<S>2474</S>; desolation<S>2721</S> shall be in the thresholds<S>5592</S>: for he shall uncover<S>6168</S> the cedar work<S>731</S>. <sup>cormorant: or, pelican</sup> <sup>upper: or, knops, or, chapiters</sup> <sup>for: or, when he hath uncovered</sup>

This is the rejoicing<S>5947</S> city<S>5892</S> that dwelt<S>3427</S> carelessly<S>983</S>, that said<S>559</S> in her heart<S>3824</S>, I am, and there is none beside<S>657</S> me: how is she become a desolation<S>8047</S>, a place for beasts<S>2416</S> to lie down in<S>4769</S>! every one that passeth by<S>5674</S> her shall hiss<S>8319</S>, and wag<S>5128</S> his hand<S>3027</S>.

3.text: Woe<S>1945</S> to her that is filthy<S>4754</S> and polluted<S>1351</S>, to the oppressing<S>3238</S> city<S>5892</S>! <sup>her: or, gluttonous: Heb. craw</sup>

She obeyed<S>8085</S> not the voice<S>6963</S>; she received<S>3947</S> not correction<S>4148</S>; she trusted<S>982</S> not in the LORD<S>3068</S>; she drew not near<S>7126</S> to her God<S>430</S>. <sup>correction: or, instruction</sup>

Her princes<S>8269</S> within<S>7130</S> her are roaring<S>7580</S> lions<S>738</S>; her judges<S>8199</S> are evening<S>6153</S> wolves<S>2061</S>; they gnaw not the bones<S>1633</S> till the morrow<S>1242</S>.

Her prophets<S>5030</S> are light<S>6348</S> and treacherous<S>900</S> persons<S>582</S>: her priests<S>3548</S> have polluted<S>2490</S> the sanctuary<S>6944</S>, they have done violence<S>2554</S> to the law<S>8451</S>.

The just<S>6662</S> LORD<S>3068</S> is in the midst<S>7130</S> thereof; he will not do<S>6213</S> iniquity<S>5766</S>: every<S>1242</S> morning<S>1242</S> doth he bring<S>5414</S> his judgment<S>4941</S> to light<S>216</S>, he faileth<S>5737</S> not; but the unjust<S>5767</S> knoweth<S>3045</S> no shame<S>1322</S>. <sup>every: Heb. morning by morning</sup>

I have cut off<S>3772</S> the nations<S>1471</S>: their towers<S>6438</S> are desolate<S>8074</S>; I made their streets<S>2351</S> waste<S>2717</S>, that none passeth by<S>5674</S>: their cities<S>5892</S> are destroyed<S>6658</S>, so that there is no man<S>376</S>, that there is none inhabitant<S>3427</S>. <sup>towers: or, corners</sup>

I said<S>559</S>, Surely thou wilt fear<S>3372</S> me, thou wilt receive<S>3947</S> instruction<S>4148</S>; so their dwelling<S>4583</S> should not be cut off<S>3772</S>, howsoever<S>834</S> <S>3605</S> I punished<S>6485</S> them: but<S>403</S> they rose early<S>7925</S>, and corrupted<S>7843</S> all their doings<S>5949</S>.

Therefore wait<S>2442</S> ye upon me, saith<S>5002</S> the LORD<S>3068</S>, until the day<S>3117</S> that I rise up<S>6965</S> to the prey<S>5706</S>: for my determination<S>4941</S> is to gather<S>622</S> the nations<S>1471</S>, that I may assemble<S>6908</S> the kingdoms<S>4467</S>, to pour<S>8210</S> upon them mine indignation<S>2195</S>, even all my fierce<S>2740</S> anger<S>639</S>: for all the earth<S>776</S> shall be devoured<S>398</S> with the fire<S>784</S> of my jealousy<S>7068</S>.

For then will I turn<S>2015</S> to the people<S>5971</S> a pure<S>1305</S> language<S>8193</S>, that they may all call<S>7121</S> upon the name<S>8034</S> of the LORD<S>3068</S>, to serve<S>5647</S> him with one<S>259</S> consent<S>7926</S>. <sup>language: Heb. lip</sup> <sup>consent: Heb. shoulder</sup>
From beyond<S>5676</S> the rivers<S>5104</S> of Ethiopia<S>3568</S> my suppliants<S>6282</S>, even the daughter<S>1323</S> of my dispersed<S>6327</S>, shall bring<S>2986</S> mine offering<S>4503</S>.

In that day<S>3117</S> shalt thou not be ashamed<S>954</S> for all thy doings<S>5949</S>, wherein thou hast transgressed<S>6586</S> against me: for then I will take away<S>5493</S> out of the midst<S>7130</S> of thee them that rejoice<S>5947</S> in thy pride<S>1346</S>, and thou shalt no more<S>3254</S> be haughty<S>1361</S> because of my holy<S>6944</S> mountain<S>2022</S>. <sup>because: Heb. in my holy</sup>

I will also leave<S>7604</S> in the midst<S>7130</S> of thee an afflicted<S>6041</S> and poor<S>1800</S> people<S>5971</S>, and they shall trust<S>2620</S> in the name<S>8034</S> of the LORD<S>3068</S>.

The remnant<S>7611</S> of Israel<S>3478</S> shall not do<S>6213</S> iniquity<S>5766</S>, nor speak<S>1696</S> lies<S>3577</S>; neither shall a deceitful<S>8649</S> tongue<S>3956</S> be found<S>4672</S> in their mouth<S>6310</S>: for they shall feed<S>7462</S> and lie down<S>7257</S>, and none shall make them afraid<S>2729</S>.

Sing<S>7442</S>, O daughter<S>1323</S> of Zion<S>6726</S>; shout<S>7321</S>, O Israel<S>3478</S>; be glad<S>8055</S> and rejoice<S>5937</S> with all the heart<S>3820</S>, O daughter<S>1323</S> of Jerusalem<S>3389</S>.

The LORD<S>3068</S> hath taken away<S>5493</S> thy judgments<S>4941</S>, he hath cast out<S>6437</S> thine enemy<S>341</S>: the king<S>4428</S> of Israel<S>3478</S>, even the LORD<S>3068</S>, is in the midst<S>7130</S> of thee: thou shalt not see<S>7200</S> evil<S>7451</S> any more.

In that day<S>3117</S> it shall be said<S>559</S> to Jerusalem<S>3389</S>, Fear<S>3372</S> thou not: and to Zion<S>6726</S>, Let not thine hands<S>3027</S> be slack<S>7503</S>. <sup>slack: or, faint</sup>

The LORD<S>3068</S> thy God<S>430</S> in the midst<S>7130</S> of thee is mighty<S>1368</S>; he will save<S>3467</S>, he will rejoice<S>7797</S> over thee with joy<S>8057</S>; he will rest<S>2790</S> in his love<S>160</S>, he will joy<S>1523</S> over thee with singing<S>7440</S>. <sup>rest: Heb. be silent</sup>

I will gather<S>622</S> them that are sorrowful<S>3013</S> for the solemn assembly<S>4150</S>, who are of thee, to whom the reproach<S>2781</S> of it was a burden<S>4864</S>. <sup>reproach: Heb. the burden upon it was reproach</sup>

Behold, at that time<S>6256</S> I will undo<S>6213</S> all that afflict<S>6031</S> thee: and I will save<S>3467</S> her that halteth<S>6760</S>, and gather<S>6908</S> her that was driven out<S>5080</S>; and I will get<S>7760</S> them praise<S>8416</S> and fame<S>8034</S> in every land<S>776</S> where they have been put to shame<S>1322</S>. <sup>get: Heb. set them for a praise</sup> <sup>where: Heb. of their shame</sup>

At that time<S>6256</S> will I bring<S>935</S> you again, even in the time<S>6256</S> that I gather<S>6908</S> you: for I will make<S>5414</S> you a name<S>8034</S> and a praise<S>8416</S> among all people<S>5971</S> of the earth<S>776</S>, when I turn back<S>7725</S> your captivity<S>7622</S> before your eyes<S>5869</S>, saith<S>559</S> the LORD<S>3068</S>.
